filer_name: T. Rowe Price Investment Management, Inc.
L1_headline: + HOLX – T. Rowe Price Investment Management discloses 9.7% stake. | 11/14/25
L2_brief: T. Rowe Price Investment Management, Inc. filed Amendment No. 4 to its Schedule 13G disclosing beneficial ownership of 21,550,364 shares of Hologic Inc common stock, representing 9.7% of the class. The filing is made under Rule 13d-1(b)(1)(ii)(E) as a registered investment adviser, and the filer certifies the shares were acquired in the ordinary course of business and not for the purpose of changing or influencing control of the issuer.

L3_detailed.position_change: Amendment No. 4; prior position percentage not disclosed in this filing
L3_detailed.purpose_of_transaction: Shares acquired and held in the ordinary course of business. Per Item 10 certification: 'the securities referred to above were acquired and are held in the ordinary course of business and were not acquired and are not held for the purpose of or with the effect of changing or influencing the control of the issuer of the securities and were not acquired and are not held in connection with or as a participant in any transaction having that purpose or effect.'
L3_detailed.activist_intentions: None stated. Filed under Rule 13d-1(b) as a passive investment adviser. Filer expressly denies beneficial ownership is held for the purpose of influencing control.
L3_detailed.deal_implications: T. Rowe Price holds a 9.7% passive stake, making it a significant shareholder whose vote would be material in any future transaction requiring shareholder approval.
risks_flagged: Large passive holder whose position could be material in any shareholder vote on a potential transaction
